parameters.content:
## Shared private error notifications

Connect the dedicated Telegram credential and QA group. In each monitored workflow, select this workflow under Settings > Error workflow. After a synthetic failure test, activate this Error Trigger workflow; monitored Actor workflows and schedules remain inactive.

## Minimal operational data

Alerts contain workflow name, execution ID, last node, a truncated error message, and the private execution link. Input items, credentials, tokens, cookies, and stack traces are never included.
